description: Merged v1 stability manifest: repo starter cases plus the custom shampoo-room case. Put your shampoo image at data/custom/shampoo_room.png or update that path before running.

samples.question: Where is the shampoo?
samples.notes: Small bottle on the left dresser, near the round mirror. Good for testing small-object grounding.

samples.question: What are the tree branches in front of?
samples.notes: Spatial relation case from GQA. Small target region.

samples.question: What vegetable is above the cooked carrot in the salad?
samples.notes: Fine-grained food recognition with a relation phrase.

samples.question: What is the standing woman wearing?
samples.notes: Accessory grounding on a crowded indoor scene.

samples.question: Can you tell me what the boy is holding in his right hand while standing in the bathroom?
samples.notes: Small object under action and body-part constraints.

samples.question: How long has the drink on the right been aged?
samples.notes: OCR-like small text region on a bottle label.

samples.question: What brand of perfume is displayed in front of the yellow box?
samples.notes: Object relation plus text recognition. Good small-region stress case.
